claims.summary: Recess permits nonproductive activity but does not imply an absence of environmental pressure.
claims.disposition: verify the Recess permission and density-aware read-only profiles

claims.summary: Pressure during whim-following should be distinguished from pressure during simple idling.
Foothold stability should be compared with movement into tail vibrancy.
Changing Recess cadence, admission, or autonomous regulation changes live Minime behavior.
claims.disposition: preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait
